experiments.title: Add a buying box to every product
experiments.hypothesis: Add a buying box to every product: this addresses a leak grounded in pdp-gingins.cro_signals.add_to_cart.present=false.
experiments.primary_change: Add a buying box to every product
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Outbound retailer click rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Rebuild the Where To Buy page into a purchase handoff
experiments.hypothesis: Rebuild the Where To Buy page into a purchase handoff: this addresses a leak grounded in where-to-buy.cro_signals.primary_cta.present=false.
experiments.primary_change: Rebuild the Where To Buy page into a purchase handoff
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Outbound retailer click rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Turn the homepage into shopper-mission cards
experiments.hypothesis: Turn the homepage into shopper-mission cards: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-home-single-cta.
experiments.primary_change: Turn the homepage into shopper-mission cards
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Homepage click-through to category improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Sell a travel nausea kit from the Ginger Rescue formats
experiments.hypothesis: Sell a travel nausea kit from the Ginger Rescue formats: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-collection-no-bundle.
experiments.primary_change: Sell a travel nausea kit from the Ginger Rescue formats
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if AOV among Ginger Rescue visitors improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Build a GIN GINS flavor sampler pack
experiments.hypothesis: Build a GIN GINS flavor sampler pack: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-collection-no-sampler.
experiments.primary_change: Build a GIN GINS flavor sampler pack
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if AOV (first-time candy shoppers) improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Package a GLP-1 ginger + turmeric support routine
experiments.hypothesis: Package a GLP-1 ginger + turmeric support routine: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-glp1-no-routine.
experiments.primary_change: Package a GLP-1 ginger + turmeric support routine
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if 30-day repeat purchase rate (GLP-1 visitors) improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Add subscribe-and-save reorder to consumable PDPs
experiments.hypothesis: Add subscribe-and-save reorder to consumable PDPs: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-pdp-no-reorder.
experiments.primary_change: Add subscribe-and-save reorder to consumable PDPs
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Repeat purchase rate (PDP buyers) improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Create a Find-Your-Ginger need quiz
experiments.hypothesis: Create a Find-Your-Ginger need quiz: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-home-no-need-routing.
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Landing-page conversion rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Create a morning-sickness ginger landing page
experiments.hypothesis: Create a morning-sickness ginger landing page: this addresses a leak grounded in visual_findings.vf-content-health-pattern.
experiments.primary_change: Create a morning-sickness ginger landing page
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if Landing-page conversion rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.

experiments.title: Replace the /cart 404 with a purchase-recovery page
experiments.hypothesis: Replace the /cart 404 with a purchase-recovery page: this addresses a leak grounded in cart.network.responses[].status=404.
experiments.primary_change: Replace the /cart 404 with a purchase-recovery page
experiments.decision_rule: Ship if /cart exit rate improves without hurting site-wide conversion.
